code:
%% Circuit Breaker Pattern - Fault Tolerance %% Version: 1.0.0 %% Date: 2025-10-27 %% Description: Circuit breaker pattern for webhook delivery and external service calls stateDiagram-v2 [CloudNative_Serverless] --> Closed: Initial State Closed --> Open: Failure Threshold Exceeded
(CloudNative_ServiceMesh) Closed --> Closed: Successful Request
(CloudNative_Serverless) Closed --> Closed: Failed Request
(CloudNative_Serverless) Open --> HalfOpen: Timeout Elapsed
(CloudNative_Serverless) Open --> Open: Request Attempted
(CloudNative_K8sCluster) HalfOpen --> Closed: Test Request Successful
(CloudNative_ServiceMesh) HalfOpen --> Open: Test Request Failed
(CloudNative_HelmChart) HalfOpen --> HalfOpen: Waiting for Test
(CloudNative_ServiceMesh) note right of Closed CLOSED STATE - All requests flow through - Monitor failure rate - Track response times - Increment error counter end note note right of Open OPEN STATE - Block all requests - Return cached response - Or return error immediately - Wait for timeout period - Log all blocked attempts end note note right of HalfOpen HALF-OPEN STATE - Allow test requests - Limited throughput - Monitor success rate - Quick transition decision end note

cscw_dialogue.utterance: 我们需要给团队画一个熔断器模式的完整状态图，用于webhook投递和外部服务调用的容错设计。核心要有三个状态：Closed、Open、HalfOpen，从Serverless函数开始触发。
明白，我先确认一下状态流转逻辑。Closed是初始状态，当故障阈值超过时通过ServiceMesh切换到Open，对吗？还有成功和失败的请求在Closed内部怎么体现？
对的，Closed内部要有自循环：成功请求走Serverless链路，失败请求也走Serverless但要计数。Open状态超时后由Serverless触发进入HalfOpen，另外Open状态下如果有请求尝试，要记录K8sCluster层面的阻断。
好的，我已经画好了主干状态流转。现在补充HalfOpen的分支：测试成功通过ServiceMesh回到Closed，测试失败通过HelmChart回到Open，等待测试状态也走ServiceMesh自循环。
每个状态需要详细的注释说明。Closed状态要强调全流量通过、监控故障率、追踪响应时间、递增错误计数器；Open状态要说明阻断请求、返回缓存或立即报错、记录阻断日志。
注释已添加。HalfOpen的注释我也补上了：允许测试请求、有限吞吐量、监控成功率、快速决策切换。这样三个状态的职责边界就清晰了。
检查一遍：Open到HalfOpen的触发条件是Timeout Elapsed，这个超时是由Serverless层控制的，不是K8sCluster对吧？另外HalfOpen自循环的Waiting for Test也是ServiceMesh？
确认无误。Open→HalfOpen是Serverless触发的超时，HalfOpen自循环的等待测试也是ServiceMesh负责。整个图现在完整了，覆盖了熔断器从正常到故障再到恢复的完整生命周期。
